title: crocodeilanthe laminata
side_effects: Crocodeilanthe laminata can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. If ingested, it can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as interact with medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions like high blood pressure and kidney disease. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or essential oils can also lead to photodermatitis, a condition characterized by skin redness and blistering upon exposure to sunlight. In severe cases, improper use of Crocodeilanthe laminata can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
